name: fe_03_05699
context_text: <A> i was nearly going to the city that day i took the day off from work and the way i go in is there's a subway called the pa it's like um pats port authority trans hudson it's subway { saint } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> jersey into manhattan and i was going to go there and there's a a place in jersey where parking becomes legal at noon so i always plan to get there a few minutes before noon it would be a perfect spot for me to park right near the pats station / <B> right / <A> if i did that and got on the train i figured to be exactly in the spot where it happened you know at the lower level exactly at the time it did but i just happened to be watching a tv show and i kinda got interested in what i was watching / <B> mhm / <A> so i kinda let time lapse and then about twenty minutes after i was by by coincidence the only station channel nine here which wasn't marked off the air cause their antenna 's on the empire state building not the world trade centre / <B> okay
